fields.description:
Define REST API for cart operations.

Endpoints needed:
- POST /api/cart/items — Add item to cart
- PATCH /api/cart/items/{id} — Update quantity
- DELETE /api/cart/items/{id} — Remove item
- GET /api/cart — Get current cart with totals
- POST /api/cart/coupon — Apply coupon code
- DELETE /api/cart/coupon — Remove coupon

All endpoints require authentication. Cart is per-user, identified by JWT.

comments.body: Use optimistic locking on cart updates to prevent race conditions. Include a version field in the cart response and require it on mutations.
Please include product image URL and stock availability in the GET /api/cart response so we don't need a separate call.

fields.description:
When user proceeds to checkout, validate that all cart items are still in stock.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Check stock for all items in a single DB query
- If any item is out of stock, return 409 with details of which items
- Reserve inventory during checkout (15 min TTL)
- Release reservation if checkout is abandoned or fails

Track carts that are created but never checked out for analytics.

- Log cart abandonment events after 24h of inactivity
- Store: items in cart, total value, last activity timestamp
- Weekly report of abandonment rate and top abandoned products
